title: Receiving Complaints. Victims of illegal recruitment, trafficking in persons,
content: 8 and other related cases which are administrative or criminal in nature may file with the 9 Department a report or complaint in writing and under oath. 10 11 Complaints and reports involving illegal recruitment and trafficking in persons committed 12 by means of, or in the guise of recruitment for overseas employment may also be filed 13 with the appropriate Regional Office of the Department for proper evaluation. 14 15
